project_type: Full-stack VPN panel: Go backend + Vue 3 + TypeScript frontends (admin + portal)
test_framework: vue-tsc for type checking, go test for backend
build_command: cd panel/web/admin && npm install && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
test_command: cd panel/web/portal && npm install && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run admin build: cd panel/web/admin && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build. 2. Run portal build: cd panel/web/portal && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build. 3. Run Go build: cd panel && go build ./... 4. Run Go tests: cd panel && go test ./...
setup_instructions: cd panel/web/admin && npm install; cd panel/web/portal && npm install
environment_constraints: Network allows npm install. No docker daemon expected.
contribution_requirements: Changes must be update-friendly (additive i18n keys, spread-operator config merge, no removed behavior, backward-compatible API endpoints). UI must be phone-friendly with responsive breakpoints. Source must not break existing saved configs.

key_patterns.i18n: useI18n composable at panel/web/shared/composables/useI18n.ts. Admin keys in panel/web/admin/src/i18n.ts, portal keys in panel/web/portal/src/i18n.ts. All user-visible strings use t('key') pattern.
key_patterns.theme: useTheme composable at panel/web/shared/composables/useTheme.ts. 5 themes (midnight, kiro, github, soft-dark, corporate). CSS variables in panel/web/shared/styles/tokens.css. Themes set data-ui-theme attribute.
key_patterns.rtl: useI18n sets dir attribute. RTL CSS uses [dir=rtl] selectors. FA locale triggers RTL.
key_patterns.sidebar_lang: TheSidebar.vue emits 'change-lang' event, AppShell.vue calls setLocale(). This should persist because useI18n watches currentLocale and saves to localStorage.
key_patterns.node_status: Node agent at node/cmd/node/main.go reports ssh status via serviceStatus('ssh') which tries sshd then ssh then dropbear systemd units. Panel reads status_metrics.ssh_status field.
key_patterns.payments: PaymentsView.vue has methodTypeOptions with bank_transfer, crypto, card, other. The crypto type already exists as a method type option.
key_patterns.backup: SettingsView.vue backup tab exports CSV files via /api/export/*.csv endpoints. There is no database dump endpoint yet.
key_patterns.bot: panel/internal/bot/bot.go has admin commands (/stats, /users, /find, /create, /enable, /disable, /traffic) and customer commands (/me, /usage, /plans). Has callback query handling for inline buttons.
key_patterns.warnings: panel/internal/api/warnings.go checks data usage percentage thresholds. Only data-percentage warnings currently.
key_patterns.topbar: TheTopbar.vue has topbar-right with margin-left:auto to push actions to right. No RTL issues expected since margin-left:auto works correctly in flexbox regardless of direction.

directory_structure: panel/ = Go backend (cmd/panel, internal/api, internal/bot, internal/db). panel/web/admin/ = admin Vue app. panel/web/portal/ = portal Vue app. panel/web/shared/ = shared UI library (composables, components, styles). node/ = node agent (cmd/node, internal/).
